entities.description: ubuntu is a location where the source files need to be copied to  indicating it is the target working directory for the task
linuxsdk is a product that needs to be compiled before proceeding with the task  as mentioned in the reference manual
debian        is a book that provides instructions for compiling the linuxsdk  as referenced in the text
src is a directory containing the case files that need to be copied to the ubuntu working directory
rk3588 linux release v1 2 1 is a software version that includes the extra tools directory for cross compilation
